author: National Geographic YouTube
text:
Exploring Unsolved Secrets & Great Dynasties | Lost Treasures of Egypt S2 MEGA Episode | Nat Geo
Explore ancient Egypt’s greatest mysteries in this Lost Treasures of Egypt Season 2 MEGA Episode from National Geographic. Archaeologists investigate the secrets of Tutankhamun, the evolution of Egypt’s pyramids, and the powerful dynasties of pharaohs including Ramses. From hidden tombs and lost chambers to new discoveries along the Red Sea coast and remote desert sites, this compilation uncovers how ancient Egypt’s rulers shaped one of history’s most fascinating civilizations. Featuring three, complete full episodes: 

Tutankhamun’s Unsolved Secrets - 00:00 
Archaeologists are on the trail of Tutankhamun. To piece together his story they search his tomb and beyond for secrets missed by the first explorers. 

Secrets of the Lost Pyramids - 44:01
Archaeologists study the mysterious pyramids that followed the Giza pyramids. They unearth new tombs and chambers to uncover their beguiling story.

Ramses: Egypt's Greatest Dynasty - 01:28:03
Archaeologists piece together how the pyramids evolved. They unearth exciting new evidence, from the spectacular Red Sea coast to the remote desert. 

Lost Treasures of Egypt | S2

About National Geographic:
National Geographic is the world's premium destination for critically acclaimed storytelling around science and exploration. Discover amazing wildlife, ancient civilizations, hidden worlds, and the incredible wonders of our Earth. Through world-class scientists, photographers, journalists, and filmmakers, Nat Geo inspires fans of all ages to connect with, explore, and care about the world.
